stories.title: UK Bets on Drones and AI in Contentious Defense Funding Plan
stories.summary: The UK will seek to transform its aging military into a force fit for modern warfare by investing in drones and artificial intelligence alongside more traditional deterrents such as fighter jets and nuclear weapons.

stories.summary: A top Iranian official reiterated the country’s determination to maintain control over maritime traffic moving through the Strait of Hormuz, raising the stakes ahead of fresh negotiations with the US on ending their war for good.

stories.title: Jana Builds Bigger Stake in Fintech Alkami, Pushes for Sale
stories.summary: Activist investor Jana Partners has built a larger stake in Alkami Technology Inc. and is urging the financial technology company to move forward with a sale, according to a person familiar with the matter.

stories.title: Pimco Sees Fed on Hold for Rest of Year
stories.summary: Pimco Head of Short-Term Portfolio Management Jerome Schneider expects the Federal Reserve to not move on interest rates for the rest of this year. He talks about how clients and investors can find growth amid hidden risks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Yen Hits Four-Decade Low in Historic Slide
stories.summary: The yen slid to its weakest level against the dollar since 1986, a milestone that will generate unease in Japan and put traders on high alert for authorities wading into the market. Bloomberg's Ruth Carson explains the context. (Source: Bloomberg)
